signals.question: Will Shai Gilgeous-Alexander win the 2025–2026 NBA MVP?
evidence: FanDuel -1500 odds as of March 24, 2026 = 93.75% implied: https://www.dimers.com/news/nba-mvp-odds-predictions-tuesday-03-24-2026-ac
OddsShark consensus -1500 to -850 across all major books: https://www.oddsshark.com/nba/mvp-betting-odds
Yahoo Sports: 'SGA Still Massive Favorite', Luka Doncic at distant +1000 #2: https://sports.yahoo.com/articles/2026-nba-mvp-odds-favorites-165600141.html
RotoWire MVP odds ladder: SGA leads every tracked sportsbook: https://www.rotowire.com/betting/nba/mvp-odds.php
signals.reasoning: Every major sportsbook prices SGA at -1500 (93.75% implied) as of March 24, 2026, yet Polymarket prices him at 81.5% — a 12.3pp gap. Polymarket's multi-contract MVP market structure systematically underweights the dominant frontrunner as probability distributes across many low-probability alternatives.

signals.question: Will Kon Knueppel win the 2025–26 NBA Rookie of the Year award?
evidence: OddsShark: Knueppel 'clear odds-on favorite' over Flagg: https://www.oddsshark.com/nba/rookie-of-the-year-betting-odds
Yahoo Sports: 'Knueppel Now Clear Odds-On Favorite'; Cooper Flagg missed 8 straight games: https://sports.yahoo.com/articles/2026-nba-rookie-odds-flagg-133900293.html
signals.reasoning: Knueppel is priced at -190 to -220 (65–69% implied) across every major sportsbook following Flagg’s extended 8-game absence, yet Polymarket has him at 51.6% — a 13.9pp gap. NOTE: This signal was previously identified (SIG-008); price has tightened from 0.528 to 0.516 vs prior scan.

signals.question: Will Sweden qualify for the 2026 FIFA World Cup?
evidence: Opta supercomputer: Ukraine wins semifinal in 56.5% of simulations, Sweden only 21%: https://theanalyst.com/articles/world-cup-play-off-predictions-who-can-still-qualify-2026

William Hill: Ukraine EVS to progress including ET/penalties; Sweden 7/5 to win in 90 min only: https://news.williamhill.com/football/world-cup-qualifier-ukraine-v-sweden-predictions-and-betting-odds/
Sweden: 0 wins in 6 qualifying matches, 4 goals scored, 12 conceded — qualify only via Nations League route: https://www.uefa.com/european-qualifiers/news/
Two-match path required: beat Ukraine (19:45 UTC tonight), then beat Poland or Albania on March 31: https://www.covers.com/soccer/world-cup/2026-playoff-odds-bracket
signals.reasoning: Sweden must win two single-elimination matches to qualify; Opta gives them only a 21% chance to beat Ukraine tonight, and even conservative bookmaker estimates (40%) compound to give ~14–18% overall qualification probability — well below the 35.5% Polymarket price. NOTE: This signal was previously identified (SIG-013); match kicks off 19:45 UTC tonight.
